get.description: Retrieve detailed information of a specific restaurant

delete.description: Delete a restaurant (soft delete, only if no products are associated)

get.description: Retrieve detailed information of a specific product

put.description: Update the active status of a product

get.description: Retrieve detailed information of a specific category

delete.description: Delete a category (only if no products are associated)

get.summary: Get restaurants with pagination, search, and filters
get.description: Retrieve paginated list of restaurants with search, status filter, and sorting capabilities

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for name, address, phone, email, or ID

post.description: Create a new restaurant with details and optional logo

get.summary: Get products with pagination, search, and filters
get.description: Retrieve paginated list of products with search, category, restaurant, status filters, and sorting

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for name or description

post.description: Create a new product with details and optional image

get.summary: Get categories with pagination, search, and sort
get.description: Retrieve paginated list of categories with search and sorting capabilities

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for name or ID

post.description: Create a new category with name, icon, and order

get.description: Export all restaurants to a CSV file with optional filters
Verify if a restaurant name already exists (excluding a specific ID when updating)

parameters.name: excludeId
parameters.description: Exclude this ID from check (for update scenarios)

get.description: Export all categories to an Excel file
Verify if a category name already exists (excluding a specific ID when updating)

parameters.name: excludeId
parameters.description: Exclude this ID from check (for update scenarios)
